title: MineGPT
body:
This mod allows you to chat with ChatGPT within Minecraft.  
How to use and configure this mod?  
View the tutorials on [GIthub](https://github.com/MCTeamPotato/MineGPT/blob/main/README.md).  
The default configuration has been written, only the 'API' in the configuration needs to be provided_ Just add your OpenAI API with KEY.  
Please enter "/mgpt reload" to reload the configuration file.  
I have completed the configuration, how can I use it?  
After configuring and loading MineGPT Mod, enter "/chatgpt <Info> " in the game.  

# Other

[MCMOD](https://www.mcmod.cn/author/28061.html) | MCTeamPotato.
